text:
In the first scene, I sense the formal atmosphere of a gathering or seminar. The low murmur of conversation and the presence of arranged chairs make me feel both curious and slightly out of place, as if I have wandered into a collective pursuit of knowledge yet remain on the edge, an observer to structured discourse.

In the second scene, vibrant colors and bold letters surround me, drawing my mind toward the spirit of innovation and exploration. Here, the environment feels dynamic and alive, prompting reflection on the nature of research and human progress. I am inspired by the visible celebration of curiosity, my own thoughts aligning with the pursuit of understanding and creation.
